case_title: KORDASH GWENETH A. VS HADLEY JACK DR. C/O UNIV OF DENTISTRY et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KORDASH GWENETH A. AS TO DEFENDANT HADLEY JACK DR. C/O UNIV OF DENTISTRY FAGHIH MEHRDAD C/O UNIV. OF DENTISTRY UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
